title: Hezbollah drone attacks on Israeli positions — Biyyada, Rachaf, Misgav Am targeted
snippet: Hezbollah said Saturday it launched separate artillery shell attacks on Israeli positions in Biyyada and Rachaf (southern Lebanon), and a drone attack in Misgav Am (Israel border town). These attacks continue the escalation pattern since 4/21 first rocket and 5/9 cross-border claims.
tag_reason: 5/10 신규 헤즈볼라 공격 (비야다·라차프·미스가브암). 5/9 나하리야/메론 공격과 별도의 새 표적.
